principle: Dataset-level coverage + proxy/synthetic paths. Registry cards are the query surface; collections hold bulk bytes; proxies declare how thin cells can still be researched.

dataset_profiles.name: Procurement Source Family Registry

dataset_profiles.name: CoinGecko Simple Price API

dataset_profiles.name: Ethereum USDT Transfer Catalogue
dataset_profiles.limitations: Historical access requires BigQuery OAuth/ADC and a billing/quota project; local sample is only a proof of the live RPC path; no exchange/entity labels yet.

dataset_profiles.name: SPK v1 Sepolia Runtime Snapshot

dataset_profiles.name: SPK v1 Network Payment Ledger
dataset_profiles.limitations: Derived from Solarpunk chain indexer; Sepolia testnet only.

dataset_profiles.name: Cross-Asset Fused Country-Week Primary Panel
dataset_profiles.limitations: Country proxy returns, not ticker-level attribution; latest run pinned in default_run_id.

dataset_profiles.name: Ticker Week Country-Broadcast News-Market Panel
dataset_profiles.limitations: Broadcast join, not named-entity attribution; large row count (~460k).

dataset_profiles.name: Ticker Week Entity-Resolved News-Market Panel
dataset_profiles.limitations: Article coverage limited to local scored/normalized windows; alias matching uses v2 supplemental aliases with match tiers.

dataset_profiles.name: Ticker Week Entity Long Panel (zero-filled)
dataset_profiles.limitations: Large panel; zeros are structural absences not confirmed non-coverage.

dataset_profiles.name: Ticker Week Entity Idiosyncratic Residual Panel
dataset_profiles.limitations: Requires broadcast panel in same run directory; residual is mention-level not return residual.

dataset_profiles.name: Data Collection Queue Status
dataset_profiles.limitations: Local optiplex queue only; cluster workers require separate monitoring.

dataset_profiles.name: DataCite Local Harvest Lane Status
dataset_profiles.limitations: Most shard files may live on GDrive/cluster; local tree often mirrors checkpoints only.
